prestazioni: Replace the stock **Koenigsegg 4.8L V8 (engine code: K48DETT)** twin-supercharged internals with forged **JE Pistons 2618-T6 aluminum slugs (9.5:1 CR, custom dome for E85/race gas compatibility)** and **Manley Turbo Tuff H-beam connecting rods (224g weight, ARP 2000 bolts)** to handle 1,200+ HP on E85 while maintaining the factory dry-sump oiling system with an **Aviaid 8-stage scavenger pump upgrade**.

Install a **custom-built Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger (88mm inducer, 1.4 A/R titanium-aluminide turbine housing, ball-bearing CHRA)** per bank, paired with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates (dual-port, 3-bar springs)** and **Precision Turbo 60mm external wastegate dump tubes (ceramic-coated, 4-inch outlet)** to eliminate backpressure while retaining the CCXR’s flex-fuel capability via a **Motec M150 ECU with dual ethanol sensors (Continental 13577571) and Bosch 2,200cc high-flow injectors (PN: 0 280 158 187)**.

Upgrade the **Koenigsegg-designed carbon-fiber intake manifold** with **Sniper EFI 90mm throttle bodies (billet aluminum, individual runner length tuning for 7,200 RPM powerband)** and a **Vibrant Performance 4-inch titanium velocity stack system (polished, 3D-printed internal vanes for optimized airflow separation)**. Pair with a **custom Akrapovič 4-2-1 titanium exhaust manifold (Inconel 625 flanges, 1.75-inch primaries, 3.5-inch collectors)** and a **dual-mode Akrapovič Evolution Line exhaust (valvetronic bypass, carbon-fiber mufflers, 304 stainless steel tubing)** for sub-1,000 RPM idle refinement and 1,200+ HP track aggression.
estetica: Replace the stock **Koenigsegg dihedral synchro-helix door actuators** with **custom carbon-fiber door skins (pre-preg autoclave, 3K twill weave, matte clear coat with diamond flake pigment)** and **electrochromic privacy glass (SageGlass Harmony, 5-zone dimming for UV/IR rejection)** to reduce cockpit heat soak while maintaining the Trevita’s signature exposed carbon aesthetic.

Install a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (modified for CCXR chassis, 3-piece carbon-fiber fenders with integrated air curtains, 50mm extended wheel arches)** paired with **HRE FF01 wheels (20x11.5 front, 21x13 rear, forged 6061-T6, 3-piece modular design, titanium hardware, custom offset for Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires: 285/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear)** and **AP Racing CP9660 6-piston monoblock calipers (radial-mount, 400mm CCM-R rotors, titanium pistons)** for track-ready braking.

Integrate a **custom Vorsteiner carbon-fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for CCXR undertray, 3-stage adjustable dive planes, titanium mounting hardware)** with a **Koenigsegg-designed active rear diffuser (carbon-fiber, hydraulic actuation, 3-position angle adjustment via Motec PDM15)** and **Griot’s Garage Ceramic Coating (9H hardness, hydrophobic, applied to entire carbon body including the Trevita’s diamond-weave exposed carbon sections)** for UV protection and self-cleaning properties.
